Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*****************************************************************************************

 Bicategory laws for enriched profunctors

 In this file we establish the bicategory laws for enriched profunctors.

 Contents
 1. Naturality for the associator
 2. The triangle law
 3. The pentagon law

 *****************************************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.BenabouCosmos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Enrichment.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentTransformation.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Profunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.StandardProfunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.ProfunctorTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Invertible.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.ProfunctorSquares.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Coend.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Composition.CompositionProf.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Composition.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Composition.Associators.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Composition.Whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Symmetric.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Closed.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope moncat.

Import MonoidalNotations.

Opaque sym_mon_braiding.

(** * 1. Naturality for the associator *)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R₁, R₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation R₁ R₂
enriched_profunctor_comp_transformation
  (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor P
     (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q τ))
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P Q R₂) =
enriched_profunctor_comp_transformation
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P Q R₁)
  (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) τ)


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R₁, R₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation R₁ R₂
enriched_profunctor_comp_transformation
  (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor P
     (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q τ))
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P Q R₂) =
enriched_profunctor_comp_transformation
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P Q R₁)
  (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) τ)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R₁, R₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation R₁ R₂
z: C₄
w: C₁
lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P
  (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q τ) z w
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₂ z w =
lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₁ z w
· lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) τ z w

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R₁, R₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation R₁ R₂
z: C₄
w: C₁
∏ y : C₂,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₁) z w y
· (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P
     (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q τ) z w
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₂ z w) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₁) z w y
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₁ z w
   · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) τ z w)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R₁, R₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation R₁ R₂
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₁) z w x
· (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P
     (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q τ) z w
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₂ z w) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₁) z w x
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₁ z w
   · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) τ z w)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R₁, R₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation R₁ R₂
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₁) z w x
· (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P
     (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q τ) z w
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₂ z w) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R₁, R₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation R₁ R₂
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
?b =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₁) z w x
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₁ z w
   · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) τ z w)

comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₁) z w x
· (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P
     (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q τ) z w
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₂ z w) =

E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R₁, R₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation R₁ R₂
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₁) z w x
· lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P
    (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q τ) z w
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₂ z w = 
?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R₁, R₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation R₁ R₂
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₁) z w x
· lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P
    (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q τ) z w = ?y'

    apply lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor_comm.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R₁, R₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation R₁ R₂
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
identity (P x w)
#⊗ lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q τ z x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
    (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₂) z w x
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₂ z w =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₁) z w x
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₁ z w
   · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) τ z w)

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂

R₁, R₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation R₁ R₂
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₁) z w x
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₁ z w
   · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) τ z w) =
identity (P x w)
#⊗ lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q τ z x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
    (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₂) z w x
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₂ z w

comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₁) z w x
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₁ z w
   · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) τ z w) = ?b

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

?b =
identity (P x w)
#⊗ lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q τ z x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
    (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₂) z w x
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₂ z w

  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₁) z w x
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₁ z w
   · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) τ z w) = ?b

τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation R₁ R₂

comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₁) z w x

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R₁, R₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation R₁ R₂
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₁) z w x
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₁ z w =
?y'

    apply lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data_comm.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R₁, R₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation R₁ R₂
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P x w)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q R₁ z x)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q R₁ z x w
  #⊗ identity (P x w)
· internal_eval (P x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) R₁ z w)
· lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) τ z w =
identity (P x w)
#⊗ lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q τ z x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
    (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₂) z w x
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₂ z w

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R₁, R₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation R₁ R₂
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
internal_transpose
  (sym_mon_braiding V (P x w)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q R₁ z x)
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q R₁ z x w
     #⊗ identity (P x w)
   · internal_eval (P x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) R₁ z w)
   · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) τ z w) =
internal_transpose
  (identity (P x w)
   #⊗ lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q τ z x
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
       (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₂) z w x
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₂ z w)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R₁, R₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation R₁ R₂
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
∏ y : C₃,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R₁ z x y
· internal_transpose
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q R₁ z x)
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q R₁ z x
         w #⊗ identity (P x w)
     · internal_eval (P x w)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) R₁ z w)
     · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) τ z w) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R₁ z x y
· internal_transpose
    (identity (P x w)
     #⊗ lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q τ z x
     · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
         (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₂) z w x
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₂ z w)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R₁, R₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation R₁ R₂
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R₁ z x y
· internal_transpose
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q R₁ z x)
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q R₁ z x
         w #⊗ identity (P x w)
     · internal_eval (P x w)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) R₁ z w)
     · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) τ z w) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R₁ z x y
· internal_transpose
    (identity (P x w)
     #⊗ lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q τ z x
     · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
         (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₂) z w x
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₂ z w)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R₁, R₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation R₁ R₂
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, P x w ⟧),
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R₁ z x y
 · internal_transpose
     (sym_mon_braiding V (P x w)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q R₁ z x)
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q R₁ z x
          w #⊗ identity (P x w)
      · internal_eval (P x w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) R₁ z w)
      · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) τ z w)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) R₂ z w) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R₁ z x y
 · internal_transpose
     (identity (P x w)
      #⊗ lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q τ z x
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
          (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₂) z w x
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₂ z
          w)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) R₂ z w)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R₁, R₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation R₁ R₂
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
v: V
h: V ⟦ v, P x w ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R₁ z x y
 · internal_transpose
     (sym_mon_braiding V (P x w)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q R₁ z x)
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q R₁ z x
          w #⊗ identity (P x w)
      · internal_eval (P x w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) R₁ z w)
      · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) τ z w)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) R₂ z w) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R₁ z x y
 · internal_transpose
     (identity (P x w)
      #⊗ lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q τ z x
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
          (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₂) z w x
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₂ z
          w)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) R₂ z w)

       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q R₁ z x)

         w #⊗ identity (P x w)

· internal_transpose

     #⊗ lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q τ z x
     · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
         (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₂) z w x

  #⊗ identity (P x w)

  #⊗ identity (P x w)

     #⊗ lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q τ z x
     · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
         (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₂) z w x

w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
v: V
h: V ⟦ v, P x w ⟧
identity (Q y x ⊗ R₁ z y) #⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R₁ z x y
   #⊗ identity (P x w)
   · (internal_transpose
        (sym_mon_braiding V (P x w)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q R₁ z x)
         · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q R₁
              z x w #⊗ identity (P x w)
            · (internal_eval (P x w)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) R₁
                    z w)

                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) τ z
                   w))) #⊗ identity (P x w)
      · internal_eval (P x w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) R₂ z w))) =

· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R₁ z x y
   #⊗ identity (P x w)
   · (internal_transpose
        (identity (P x w)
         #⊗ lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q τ z x
         · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
              (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₂) z w x

comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R₁ z x y
#⊗ identity (P x w)
· (internal_transpose

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation R₁ R₂
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R₁ z x y
#⊗ identity (P x w)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₁ z x) (P x w)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P x w)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q R₁ z x)
         · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q R₁
              z x w #⊗ identity (P x w)
            · (internal_eval (P x w)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) R₁
                    z w)
               · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) τ z
                   w)))) #⊗ identity (P x w)
   · internal_eval (P x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) R₂ z w)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R₁ z x y
#⊗ identity (P x w)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₁ z x) (P x w)
      · (identity (P x w)
         #⊗ lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q τ z x
         · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
              (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₂) z w x
            · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q
                R₂ z w))) #⊗ identity (P x w)
   · internal_eval (P x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) R₂ z w))

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R₁ z x y
#⊗ identity (P x w)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₁ z x) (P x w)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P x w)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q R₁ z x)
      · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q R₁ z
           x w #⊗ identity (P x w)
         · (internal_eval (P x w)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) R₁ z w)
            · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) τ z w)))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R₁ z x y
#⊗ identity (P x w)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₁ z x) (P x w)
   · (identity (P x w)
      #⊗ lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q τ z x
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
           (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₂) z w x
         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₂
             z w)))

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation R₁ R₂
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R₁ z x y
#⊗ identity (P x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₁ z x) (P x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q R₁ z x)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q R₁ z x w
  #⊗ identity (P x w)
· internal_eval (P x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) R₁ z w)
· lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) τ z w =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R₁ z x y
#⊗ identity (P x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₁ z x) (P x w)
· identity (P x w)
  #⊗ lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q τ z x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
    (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₂) z w x
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₂ z w

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R₁, R₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation R₁ R₂
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (Q y x ⊗ R₁ z y) (P x w)
· identity (P x w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R₁ z x y
· sym_mon_braiding V (P x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q R₁ z x)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q R₁ z x w
  #⊗ identity (P x w)
· internal_eval (P x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) R₁ z w)
· lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) τ z w =
sym_mon_braiding V (Q y x ⊗ R₁ z y) (P x w)
· identity (P x w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R₁ z x y
· identity (P x w)
  #⊗ lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q τ z x
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
    (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₂) z w x
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₂ z w

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (Q y x ⊗ R₁ z y) (P x w)
· (identity (P x w)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R₁ z x y
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P x w)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q R₁ z x)
      · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q R₁ z
           x w #⊗ identity (P x w)
         · (internal_eval (P x w)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) R₁ z w)
            · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) τ z w)))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (Q y x ⊗ R₁ z y) (P x w)
· (identity (P x w)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R₁ z x y
   · (identity (P x w)
      #⊗ lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q τ z x
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
           (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₂) z w x
         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₂
             z w)))

x: C₂
y: C₃
identity (P x w)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R₁ z x y
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P x w)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q R₁ z x)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q R₁ z x w
      #⊗ identity (P x w)
      · (internal_eval (P x w)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) R₁ z w)
         · lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) τ z w))) =

#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R₁ z x y

   #⊗ lwhisker_enriched_profunctor Q τ z x
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
        (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₂) z w x
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₂ z
          w))

· (sym_mon_braiding V (P x w)

w: C₁
x: C₂

#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R₁ z x y
· sym_mon_braiding V (P x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q R₁ z x)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q R₁ z x w

       (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) R₁ z w)

      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₂ z

· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q y w x
   #⊗ identity (R₁ z y)
   · (identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q y w)

          (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) R₂ z w y)) =

#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R₁ z x y

   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P

w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
identity (P x w)
#⊗ (identity (Q y x) #⊗ τ z y
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R₂ z x y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
    (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R₂) z w x
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q R₂ z w =
mon_rassociator (P x w) (Q y x) (R₁ z y)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q y w x
   #⊗ identity (R₁ z y)
   · (identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q y w)
      #⊗ τ z y
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) R₂ z w y))

  
V: benabou_cosmos

identity (P x w)

· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P

x: C₂
y: C₃
identity (P x w)
#⊗ (identity (Q y x) #⊗ τ z y
    · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R₂ z x y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P x w)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q R₂ z x)
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q R₂ z x w
     #⊗ identity (P x w)
   · internal_eval (P x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q) R₂ z w)) =
mon_rassociator (P x w) (Q y x) (R₁ z y)

R₁, R₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation R₁ R₂
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P x w) (Q y x) (R₁ z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q y w x
  #⊗ identity (R₁ z y)
· identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q y w) #⊗ τ z y =
?b

mon_rassociator (P x w) (Q y x) (R₁ z y)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q y w x
   #⊗ identity (R₁ z y)
   · identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q y w)
     #⊗ τ z y) = ?b

y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P x w) (Q y x) (R₁ z y)
· (identity (P x w ⊗ Q y x) #⊗ τ z y
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q y w x
     #⊗ identity (R₂ z y)) = ?b

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R₁, R₂: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation R₁ R₂
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P x w) (Q y x) (R₁ z y)
· (identity (P x w ⊗ Q y x) #⊗ τ z y
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q y w x
     #⊗ identity (R₂ z y)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P x w) (Q y x ⊗ R₁ z y)
· (identity (Q y x) #⊗ τ z y) #⊗ identity (P x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (Q y x ⊗ R₂ z y) (P x w)
· mon_rassociator (P x w) (Q y x) (R₂ z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q y w x
  #⊗ identity (R₂ z y)

· (sym_mon_braiding V (Q y x ⊗ R₁ z y) (P x w)
   · (mon_rassociator (P x w) (Q y x) (R₁ z y)
      · (identity (P x w) #⊗ identity (Q y x))
        #⊗ τ z y)) =
mon_rassociator (P x w) (Q y x) (R₁ z y)
· identity (P x w ⊗ Q y x) #⊗ τ z y

· mon_rassociator (P x w) (Q y x) (R₁ z y)

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation R₁ R₂
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
mon_rassociator (P x w) (Q y x) (R₁ z y)
· identity (P x w ⊗ Q y x) #⊗ τ z y =
mon_rassociator (P x w) (Q y x) (R₁ z y)
· identity (P x w ⊗ Q y x) #⊗ τ z y

  apply idpath.

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
enriched_profunctor_comp_transformation
  (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor P
     (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ R))
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P Q₂ R) =
enriched_profunctor_comp_transformation
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P Q₁ R)
  (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor
     (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor P τ) R)


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
enriched_profunctor_comp_transformation
  (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor P
     (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ R))
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P Q₂ R) =
enriched_profunctor_comp_transformation
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P Q₁ R)
  (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor
     (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor P τ) R)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P
  (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ R) z w
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q₂ R z w =
lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q₁ R z w
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor P τ) R z w

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
∏ y : C₂,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ R) z w y
· (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P
     (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ R) z w
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q₂ R z w) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ R) z w y
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q₁ R z w
   · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
       (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor P τ) R z w)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ R) z w x
· (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P
     (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ R) z w
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q₂ R z w) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ R) z w x
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q₁ R z w
   · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
       (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor P τ) R z w)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ R) z w x
· (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P
     (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ R) z w
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q₂ R z w) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁

comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q₁ R) z w x
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P Q₁ R z w
   · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
       (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor P τ) R z w)

   · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor

rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ R z x
#⊗ identity (P x w)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q₂ R z x w
   #⊗ identity (P x w)
   · internal_eval (P x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₂) R z w))

  
V: benabou_cosmos

τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
internal_lam
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q₁ R z x w
   #⊗ identity (P x w)
   · (internal_eval (P x w)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₁) R z w)
      · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
          (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor P τ) R z w)) =
internal_lam
  (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ R z x
   #⊗ identity (P x w)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q₂ R z x w
      #⊗ identity (P x w)
      · internal_eval (P x w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₂) R z w)))

               (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₂) R z w)))

z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, P x w ⟧),
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ R z x y
 · internal_lam
     (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q₁ R z x w
      #⊗ identity (P x w)
      · (internal_eval (P x w)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₁) R z w)
         · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
             (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor P τ) R z w)))

· internal_eval (P x w)

       (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₂) R z w) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ R z x y
 · internal_lam
     (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ R z x
      #⊗ identity (P x w)
      · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q₂ R z
           x w #⊗ identity (P x w)
         · internal_eval (P x w)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₂) R z w))))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₂) R z w)

· internal_lam

     #⊗ identity (P x w)

identity (Q₁ y x ⊗ R z y) #⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ R z x y
  #⊗ identity (P x w)
· internal_lam
    (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q₁ R z x w
     #⊗ identity (P x w)
     · (internal_eval (P x w)

       (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₂) R z w) =

· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ R z x y
  #⊗ identity (P x w)
· internal_lam
    (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ R z x
     #⊗ identity (P x w)
     · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q₂ R z x
          w #⊗ identity (P x w)
        · internal_eval (P x w)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₂) R z w)))

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
v: V
h: V ⟦ v, P x w ⟧
identity (Q₁ y x ⊗ R z y) #⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ R z x y
   #⊗ identity (P x w)
   · (internal_lam
        (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q₁ R z
           x w #⊗ identity (P x w)
         · (internal_eval (P x w)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₁) R z w)
            · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
                (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor P τ) R z
                w)) #⊗ identity (P x w)
      · internal_eval (P x w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₂) R z w))) =
identity (Q₁ y x ⊗ R z y) #⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ R z x y
   #⊗ identity (P x w)
   · (internal_lam
        (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ R z x
         #⊗ identity (P x w)
         · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q₂ R
              z x w #⊗ identity (P x w)
            · internal_eval (P x w)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₂) R z
                   w))) #⊗ identity (P x w)
      · internal_eval (P x w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₂) R z w)))

z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ R z x y
 · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q₁ R z x w)
#⊗ identity (P x w)
· internal_eval (P x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₁) R z w) = ?y'

    apply lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_comm.

x: C₂
y: C₃
lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob P Q₁ R z y x w
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor P τ) R z w =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₁ R z x y
#⊗ identity (P x w)
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ R z x
  #⊗ identity (P x w)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q₂ R z x w
  #⊗ identity (P x w)
· internal_eval (P x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₂) R z w)

sym_mon_braiding V (Q₁ y x ⊗ R z y) (P x w)
· (mon_rassociator (P x w) (Q₁ y x) (R z y)
   · ((identity (P x w) #⊗ τ y x
       · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q₂ y w x)
      #⊗ identity (R z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₂) R z w y))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(τ y x #⊗ identity (R z y)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₂ R z x y)
#⊗ identity (P x w)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q₂ R z x w
  #⊗ identity (P x w)
· internal_eval (P x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₂) R z w) = ?b

  #⊗ identity (P x w)

   #⊗ identity (P x w)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q₂ R z x w
      #⊗ identity (P x w)
      · internal_eval (P x w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₂) R z w))) =

comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₂ R z x y
#⊗ identity (P x w)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q₂ R z x w
   #⊗ identity (P x w)
   · internal_eval (P x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₂) R z w)) =
?t2

τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q₂ R z x y
 · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P Q₂ R z x w)
#⊗ identity (P x w)
· internal_eval (P x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₂) R z w) = ?t2

    apply lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_comm.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(τ y x #⊗ identity (R z y)) #⊗ identity (P x w)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob P Q₂ R z y x
    w =
sym_mon_braiding V (Q₁ y x ⊗ R z y) (P x w)
· (mon_rassociator (P x w) (Q₁ y x) (R z y)
   · ((identity (P x w) #⊗ τ y x
       · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q₂ y w x)
      #⊗ identity (R z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₂) R z w y))

τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂

z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(τ y x #⊗ identity (R z y)) #⊗ identity (P x w)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ y x ⊗ R z y) (P x w)
   · mon_rassociator (P x w) (Q₂ y x) (R z y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q₂ y w x
     #⊗ identity (R z y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₂) R z w y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (Q₁ y x ⊗ R z y) (P x w)

      #⊗ identity (R z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₂) R z w y))

Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(τ y x #⊗ identity (R z y)) #⊗ identity (P x w)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ y x ⊗ R z y) (P x w)
   · mon_rassociator (P x w) (Q₂ y x) (R z y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q₂ y w x
     #⊗ identity (R z y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₂) R z w y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (Q₁ y x ⊗ R z y) (P x w)
· (mon_rassociator (P x w) (Q₁ y x) (R z y)
   · ((identity (P x w) #⊗ τ y x) #⊗ identity (R z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q₂ y w x
        #⊗ identity (R z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₂) R z w y))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(τ y x #⊗ identity (R z y)) #⊗ identity (P x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ y x ⊗ R z y) (P x w)
· mon_rassociator (P x w) (Q₂ y x) (R z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (R z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₂) R z w y =
sym_mon_braiding V (Q₁ y x ⊗ R z y) (P x w)
· mon_rassociator (P x w) (Q₁ y x) (R z y)
· (identity (P x w) #⊗ τ y x) #⊗ identity (R z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q₂ y w x
  #⊗ identity (R z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P Q₂) R z w y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(τ y x #⊗ identity (R z y)) #⊗ identity (P x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V (Q₂ y x ⊗ R z y) (P x w)
· mon_rassociator (P x w) (Q₂ y x) (R z y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (Q₁ y x ⊗ R z y) (P x w)
· mon_rassociator (P x w) (Q₁ y x) (R z y)
· (identity (P x w) #⊗ τ y x) #⊗ identity (R z y)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (Q₁ y x ⊗ R z y) (P x w)
· identity (P x w) #⊗ (τ y x #⊗ identity (R z y))
· mon_rassociator (P x w) (Q₂ y x) (R z y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (Q₁ y x ⊗ R z y) (P x w)
· mon_rassociator (P x w) (Q₁ y x) (R z y)
· (identity (P x w) #⊗ τ y x) #⊗ identity (R z y)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (Q₁ y x ⊗ R z y) (P x w)
· (identity (P x w) #⊗ (τ y x #⊗ identity (R z y))
   · mon_rassociator (P x w) (Q₂ y x) (R z y)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (Q₁ y x ⊗ R z y) (P x w)
· (mon_rassociator (P x w) (Q₁ y x) (R z y)
   · (identity (P x w) #⊗ τ y x) #⊗ identity (R z y))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q₁, Q₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation Q₁ Q₂
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (Q₁ y x ⊗ R z y) (P x w)
· (mon_rassociator (P x w) (Q₁ y x) (R z y)
   · (identity (P x w) #⊗ τ y x) #⊗ identity (R z y)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (Q₁ y x ⊗ R z y) (P x w)
· (mon_rassociator (P x w) (Q₁ y x) (R z y)
   · (identity (P x w) #⊗ τ y x) #⊗ identity (R z y))

  apply idpath.
Qed.


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
enriched_profunctor_comp_transformation
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ Q R)
  (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor
     (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ Q) R) =
enriched_profunctor_comp_transformation
  (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ
     (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R))
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ Q R)


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
enriched_profunctor_comp_transformation
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ Q R)
  (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor
     (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ Q) R) =
enriched_profunctor_comp_transformation
  (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ
     (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R))
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ Q R)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P₁ Q R z w
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ Q) R z w =
rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor τ
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R) z w
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P₂ Q R z w

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
∏ y : C₂,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R) z w y
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P₁ Q R z w
   · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
       (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ Q) R z w) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R) z w y
· (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor τ
     (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R) z w
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P₂ Q R z w)

comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R) z w x
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P₁ Q R z w
   · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
       (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ Q) R z w) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R) z w x
· (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor τ
     (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R) z w

comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R) z w x
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P₁ Q R z w
   · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor

· (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor τ

comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R) z w x
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P₁ Q R z w =

    apply lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data_comm.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q R z x)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ Q R z x w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ Q) R z w)
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ Q) R z w =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R) z w x
· (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor τ
     (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R) z w
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P₂ Q R z w)

  
V: benabou_cosmos

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R) z w x
· (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor τ
     (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R) z w
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P₂ Q R z w) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Q R z x)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ Q R z x w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ Q) R z w)
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ Q) R z w

  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R z x)
· identity (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R z x) #⊗ τ x w
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₂ Q R z x w

z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ x w)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R z x)
· (identity (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R z x)
   #⊗ τ x w
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₂ Q R z x w
      #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
      · internal_eval (P₂ x w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ Q) R z w))) =

   · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)

           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ Q) R z w)

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
identity (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R z x) #⊗ τ x w
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₂ Q R z x w
   #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
   · internal_eval (P₂ x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ Q) R z w)) =
lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ Q R z x w
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· (internal_eval (P₁ x w)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ Q) R z w)
   · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
       (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ Q) R z w)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
internal_lam
  (identity (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R z x)
   #⊗ τ x w
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₂ Q R z x w
      #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
      · internal_eval (P₂ x w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ Q) R z w))) =
internal_lam
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ Q R z x w
   #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
   · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ Q) R z w)
      · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
          (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ Q) R z w))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
∏ y : C₃,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R z x y
· internal_lam
    (identity (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R z x)
     #⊗ τ x w
     · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₂ Q R z x
          w #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
        · internal_eval (P₂ x w)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ Q) R z w))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R z x y
· internal_lam
    (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ Q R z x w
     #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
     · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ Q) R z w)
        · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
            (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ Q) R z w))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R z x y
· internal_lam
    (identity (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R z x)
     #⊗ τ x w
     · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₂ Q R z x
          w #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
        · internal_eval (P₂ x w)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ Q) R z w))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R z x y
· internal_lam
    (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ Q R z x w
     #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
     · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ Q) R z w)
        · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
            (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ Q) R z w))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, P₁ x w ⟧),
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R z x y
 · internal_lam
     (identity (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R z x)
      #⊗ τ x w
      · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₂ Q R z
           x w #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
         · internal_eval (P₂ x w)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ Q) R z w))))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ Q) R z w) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R z x y
 · internal_lam
     (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ Q R z x w
      #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
      · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ Q) R z w)
         · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
             (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ Q) R z w)))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ Q) R z w)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
v: V
h: V ⟦ v, P₁ x w ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R z x y
 · internal_lam
     (identity (comp_enriched_profunctor Q R z x)
      #⊗ τ x w
      · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₂ Q R z
           x w #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
         · internal_eval (P₂ x w)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ Q) R z w))))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ Q) R z w) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R z x y
 · internal_lam
     (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ Q R z x w
      #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
      · (internal_eval (P₁ x w)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ Q) R z w)
         · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
             (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ Q) R z w)))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ Q) R z w)

x: C₂
y: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R z x y
#⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₂ Q R z x w
   #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R z x y
 · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₂ Q R z x w)
#⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
· internal_eval (P₂ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ Q) R z w) = ?t2

    apply lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_comm.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
identity (Q y x ⊗ R z y) #⊗ τ x w
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob P₂ Q R z y x
    w =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R z x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ Q R z x w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ Q) R z w)
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ Q) R z w

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R z x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ Q R z x w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ Q) R z w)
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ Q) R z w =
identity (Q y x ⊗ R z y) #⊗ τ x w
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob P₂ Q R z y x
    w

comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R z x y
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ Q R z x w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ Q) R z w)
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ Q) R z w = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
?b =
identity (Q y x ⊗ R z y) #⊗ τ x w
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob P₂ Q R z y x
    w

z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in Q R z x y
 · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ Q R z x w)
#⊗ identity (P₁ x w)
· internal_eval (P₁ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ Q) R z w) = ?y'

    apply lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_comm.

w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob P₁ Q R z y x w
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ Q) R z w =

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (Q y x ⊗ R z y) (P₁ x w)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (Q y x) (R z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ Q y w x
  #⊗ identity (R z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ Q) R z w y
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ Q) R z w =
identity (Q y x ⊗ R z y) #⊗ τ x w
· (sym_mon_braiding V (Q y x ⊗ R z y) (P₂ x w)
   · mon_rassociator (P₂ x w) (Q y x) (R z y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ Q y w x
     #⊗ identity (R z y)
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ Q) R z w y)

  #⊗ identity (R z y)

    (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ Q) R z w =

· τ x w #⊗ identity (Q y x ⊗ R z y)
· mon_rassociator (P₂ x w) (Q y x) (R z y)

z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V (Q y x ⊗ R z y) (P₁ x w)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ x w) (Q y x) (R z y)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ Q y w x
      #⊗ identity (R z y)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ Q) R z w y
         · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
             (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ Q) R z w))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (Q y x ⊗ R z y) (P₁ x w)
· (τ x w #⊗ identity (Q y x ⊗ R z y)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₂ x w) (Q y x) (R z y)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ Q y w x
         #⊗ identity (R z y)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ Q) R z w y)))

  #⊗ identity (R z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ Q) R z w y

    (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ Q) R z w =

E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
?b =
(τ x w #⊗ identity (Q y x)) #⊗ identity (R z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ Q y w x
  #⊗ identity (R z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ Q) R z w y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ Q y w x
#⊗ identity (R z y)
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ Q y w
  #⊗ identity (R z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ Q) R z w y = ?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ Q y w x
 · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ Q y w)
#⊗ identity (R z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ Q) R z w y = ?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ Q y w x
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor τ Q y w = ?y'

    apply rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor_comm.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(τ x w #⊗ identity (Q y x)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ Q y w x)
#⊗ identity (R z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ Q) R z w y =
(τ x w #⊗ identity (Q y x)) #⊗ identity (R z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ Q y w x
  #⊗ identity (R z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ Q) R z w y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
P₁, P₂: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
τ: enriched_profunctor_transformation P₁ P₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
R: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
z: C₄
w: C₁
x: C₂
y: C₃
(τ x w #⊗ identity (Q y x)) #⊗ identity (R z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ Q y w x
  #⊗ identity (R z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ Q) R z w y =
(τ x w #⊗ identity (Q y x)) #⊗ identity (R z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ Q y w x
  #⊗ identity (R z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ Q) R z w y

  apply idpath.
Qed.

(** * 2. The triangle law *)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
enriched_profunctor_comp_transformation
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q)
  (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor
     (runitor_enriched_profunctor P) Q) =
lwhisker_enriched_profunctor P
  (lunitor_enriched_profunctor Q)


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
enriched_profunctor_comp_transformation
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q)
  (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor
     (runitor_enriched_profunctor P) Q) =
lwhisker_enriched_profunctor P
  (lunitor_enriched_profunctor Q)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z x
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (runitor_enriched_profunctor P) Q z x =
lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P
  (lunitor_enriched_profunctor Q) z x

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
∏ y : C₂,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q) z x y
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z x
   · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
       (runitor_enriched_profunctor P) Q z x) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q) z x y
· lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P
    (lunitor_enriched_profunctor Q) z x

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q) z x y
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z x
   · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
       (runitor_enriched_profunctor P) Q z x) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q) z x y
· lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P
    (lunitor_enriched_profunctor Q) z x

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q) z x y
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z x
   · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
       (runitor_enriched_profunctor P) Q z x) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
?b =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q) z x y
· lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P
    (lunitor_enriched_profunctor Q) z x

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q) z x y
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z x
   · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
       (runitor_enriched_profunctor P) Q z x) = ?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q) z x y
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z x
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (runitor_enriched_profunctor P) Q z x = ?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q) z x y
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z x = ?y'

    apply lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data_comm.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y x
  #⊗ identity (P y x)
· internal_eval (P y x)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) Q z x)
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (runitor_enriched_profunctor P) Q z x =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q) z x y
· lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P
    (lunitor_enriched_profunctor Q) z x

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q) z x y
· lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P
    (lunitor_enriched_profunctor Q) z x =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y x
  #⊗ identity (P y x)
· internal_eval (P y x)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) Q z x)
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (runitor_enriched_profunctor P) Q z x

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q) z x y
· lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P
    (lunitor_enriched_profunctor Q) z x = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y x
  #⊗ identity (P y x)
· internal_eval (P y x)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) Q z x)
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (runitor_enriched_profunctor P) Q z x

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q) z x y
· lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P
    (lunitor_enriched_profunctor Q) z x = ?b

    apply lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor_comm.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
identity (P y x) #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor Q z y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q z x y =
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y x
  #⊗ identity (P y x)
· internal_eval (P y x)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) Q z x)
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (runitor_enriched_profunctor P) Q z x

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
internal_transpose
  (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor Q z y
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q z x y) =
internal_transpose
  (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y)
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y x
     #⊗ identity (P y x)
   · internal_eval (P y x)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P
             (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) Q z x)
   · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
       (runitor_enriched_profunctor P) Q z x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y: C₂
∏ y0 : C₂,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y y0
· internal_transpose
    (identity (P y x)
     #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor Q z y
     · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q z x y) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y y0
· internal_transpose
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y)
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P
         (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y x
       #⊗ identity (P y x)
     · internal_eval (P y x)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P
               (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) Q z
            x)
     · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
         (runitor_enriched_profunctor P) Q z x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y y'
· internal_transpose
    (identity (P y x)
     #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor Q z y
     · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q z x y) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y y'
· internal_transpose
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y)
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P
         (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y x
       #⊗ identity (P y x)
     · internal_eval (P y x)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P
               (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) Q z
            x)
     · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
         (runitor_enriched_profunctor P) Q z x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, P y x ⟧),
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y y'
 · internal_transpose
     (identity (P y x)
      #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor Q z y
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q z x y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P y x)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P Q z x) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y y'
 · internal_transpose
     (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y)
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y x
        #⊗ identity (P y x)
      · internal_eval (P y x)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P
                (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) Q z
             x)
      · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
          (runitor_enriched_profunctor P) Q z x)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P y x)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P Q z x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
v: V
h: V ⟦ v, P y x ⟧
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y y'
 · internal_transpose
     (identity (P y x)
      #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor Q z y
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q z x y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P y x)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P Q z x) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in
   (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y y'
 · internal_transpose
     (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y)
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y x
        #⊗ identity (P y x)
      · internal_eval (P y x)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P
                (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) Q z
             x)
      · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
          (runitor_enriched_profunctor P) Q z x)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P y x)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P Q z x)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
v: V
h: V ⟦ v, P y x ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y y' #⊗ h
· internal_transpose
    (identity (P y x)
     #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor Q z y
     · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q z x y)
  #⊗ identity (P y x)
· internal_eval (P y x)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P Q z x) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y y' #⊗ h
· internal_transpose
    (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y)
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P
         (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y x
       #⊗ identity (P y x)
     · internal_eval (P y x)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P
               (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) Q z
            x)
     · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
         (runitor_enriched_profunctor P) Q z x)
  #⊗ identity (P y x)
· internal_eval (P y x)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P Q z x)

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
y, y': C₂
v: V
h: V ⟦ v, P y x ⟧
identity
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y ⊗ Q z y') #⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y y'
   #⊗ identity (P y x)
   · (internal_transpose
        (identity (P y x)
         #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor Q z y
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q z x y)
      #⊗ identity (P y x)

          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P Q z x))) =

              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y)
         · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P
              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y

            · (internal_eval (P y x)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P
                       (identity_enriched_profunctor
                          E₂)) Q z x)
               · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
                   (runitor_enriched_profunctor P) Q z
                   x))) #⊗ identity (P y x)

y, y': C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y y'
#⊗ identity (P y x)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor
           (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y)
        (P y x)
      · (identity (P y x)
         #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor Q z y
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q z x y))
   #⊗ identity (P y x)

#⊗ identity (P y x)

        (P y x)

              (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y)
         · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P

            · (internal_eval (P y x)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor

                       (identity_enriched_profunctor
                          E₂)) Q z x)
               · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
                   (runitor_enriched_profunctor P) Q z
                   x)))) #⊗ identity (P y x)
   · internal_eval (P y x)

x: C₁
y, y': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y ⊗ Q z y')
  (P y x)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y y'
· identity (P y x)

· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q z x y =

· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P
    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y x
  #⊗ identity (P y x)
· internal_eval (P y x)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) Q z x)
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (runitor_enriched_profunctor P) Q z x

                    (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂))
                 Q z x)

     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y y'

· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ lunitor_enriched_profunctor Q z y
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q z x y) = ?b

#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in

· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x)

comp_enriched_profunctor_in
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y y'
· lunitor_enriched_profunctor Q z y = ?t2

    apply lunitor_enriched_profunctor_mor_comm.

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
