Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
identity (P y x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y' y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q z x y =
identity (P y x)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y y'
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y x
      #⊗ identity (P y x)
      · (internal_eval (P y x)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P
                 (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) Q
              z x)
         · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
             (runitor_enriched_profunctor P) Q z x)))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
identity (P y x)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y y'
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P
        (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y x
      #⊗ identity (P y x)
      · (internal_eval (P y x)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P
                 (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) Q
              z x)
         · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
             (runitor_enriched_profunctor P) Q z x))) =
identity (P y x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y' y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q z x y

 · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P

    apply lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_comm.

z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y ⊗ Q z y')
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob P
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) Q z y' y x
   · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
       (runitor_enriched_profunctor P) Q z x) =
identity (P y x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y' y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q z x y

  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y ⊗ Q z y')
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y ⊗ Q z y')
     (P y x)
   · mon_rassociator (P y x)
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y) (Q z y')
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
       (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y' x y
     #⊗ identity (Q z y')
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P
          (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂)) Q z x y'
   · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
       (runitor_enriched_profunctor P) Q z x) =
identity (P y x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y' y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q z x y

   #⊗ identity (Q z y')
   · (runitor_enriched_profunctor P y' x
      #⊗ identity (Q z y')

· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q z x y

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂) y' x y
· runitor_enriched_profunctor P y' x = ?y'

    apply runitor_enriched_profunctor_mor_comm.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
mon_rassociator (P y x)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y) (Q z y')
· ((sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
    · lmap_e P y y' x) #⊗ identity (Q z y')
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q z x y') =
identity (P y x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y' y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q z x y

  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y) (Q z y')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (Q z y')
   · lmap_e P y y' x #⊗ identity (Q z y')
   · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q z x y') =
identity (P y x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y' y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q z x y

  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y) (Q z y')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (Q z y')
   · (lmap_e P y y' x #⊗ identity (Q z y')
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q z x y')) =

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
mon_rassociator (P y x)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y) (Q z y')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (Q z y')
   · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (P y x) (Q z y')
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
          (P y x ⊗ Q z y')
      · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z y')
          (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
      · identity (P y x)
        #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y') (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
            · rmap_e Q z y' y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q z x y)) =
identity (P y x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y' y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q z x y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
mon_rassociator (P y x)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y) (Q z y')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q z y')
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (P y x) (Q z y')
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z y')
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z y') (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y') (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y' y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q z x y =
identity (P y x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y' y
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P Q z x y

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
mon_rassociator (P y x)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y) (Q z y')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q z y')
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (P y x) (Q z y')
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z y')
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z y') (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y') (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
      · rmap_e Q z y' y) =
identity (P y x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y' y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
mon_rassociator (P y x)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y) (Q z y')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q z y')
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (P y x) (Q z y')
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z y')
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z y') (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
· (identity (P y x)
   #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y') (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
   · identity (P y x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y' y) =
identity (P y x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y' y

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
mon_rassociator (P y x)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y) (Q z y')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q z y')
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (P y x) (Q z y')
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z y')
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z y') (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y') (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
· identity (P y x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y' y =
identity (P y x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y' y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
mon_rassociator (P y x)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y) (Q z y')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q z y')
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (P y x) (Q z y')
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z y')
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z y') (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y') (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
· identity (P y x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y' y =
identity
  (P y x
   ⊗ (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y ⊗ Q z y'))
· identity (P y x) #⊗ rmap_e Q z y' y

  #⊗ identity (Q z y')

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
y, y': C₂
mon_rassociator (P y x)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y) (Q z y')
· sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (Q z y')
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (P y x) (Q z y')
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z y')
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z y') (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y') (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) = 
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
?b =
identity
  (P y x
   ⊗ (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y ⊗ Q z y'))

  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y) (Q z y')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (Q z y')
   · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (P y x) (Q z y')
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
           (P y x ⊗ Q z y')
         · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z y')
             (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)))) = ?y'

x: C₁
y, y': C₂
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (P y x) (Q z y')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z y')
   · mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z y') (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)) =
?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

x: C₁
y, y': C₂
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (P y x) (Q z y')
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (P y x ⊗ Q z y')
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (Q z y') (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) =
?t2

    apply sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
mon_rassociator (P y x)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y) (Q z y')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (Q z y')
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (P y x)
      #⊗ identity (Q z y')
      · mon_lassociator (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
          (Q z y')
      · identity (P y x)
        #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (Q z y')))
· identity (P y x)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y') (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) =
identity
  (P y x
   ⊗ (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y ⊗ Q z y'))

E₃: enrichment C₃ V

Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
mon_rassociator (P y x)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y) (Q z y')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (Q z y')
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (P y x)
      #⊗ identity (Q z y')
      · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
           (Q z y')
         · (identity (P y x)
            #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
                 (Q z y')
            · identity (P y x)
              #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V (Q z y')
                   (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄))))) =
identity
  (P y x
   ⊗ (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y ⊗ Q z y'))

  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y) (Q z y')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (Q z y')
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (P y x)
      #⊗ identity (Q z y')
      · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
           (Q z y')
         · identity (P y x)
           #⊗ (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
mon_rassociator (P y x)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y) (Q z y')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (Q z y')
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (P y x)
      #⊗ identity (Q z y')
      · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
           (Q z y')
         · identity (P y x)
           #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) ⊗ Q z y')))) =
identity
  (P y x
   ⊗ (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y ⊗ Q z y'))

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
mon_rassociator (P y x)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y) (Q z y')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (Q z y')
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (P y x)
      #⊗ identity (Q z y')
      · (mon_lassociator (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
           (Q z y')
         · identity
             (P y x ⊗ ((E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) ⊗ Q z y'))))) =
identity
  (P y x
   ⊗ (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y ⊗ Q z y'))

identity
  (P y x
   ⊗ (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y ⊗ Q z y'))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
mon_rassociator (P y x)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y) (Q z y')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (Q z y')
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (P y x)
      #⊗ identity (Q z y')
      · mon_lassociator (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
          (Q z y'))) = ?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q z y')
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (P y x)
   #⊗ identity (Q z y')
   · mon_lassociator (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (Q z y')) =
?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
#⊗ identity (Q z y')
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (P y x)
  #⊗ identity (Q z y')
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (Q z y') =
?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
(sym_mon_braiding V (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (P y x))
#⊗ identity (Q z y')
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (Q z y') =
?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
identity (P y x ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄)) #⊗ identity (Q z y')
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (Q z y') =
?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
identity (P y x ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) ⊗ Q z y')
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (Q z y') =
?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
mon_lassociator (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (Q z y') = ?t2

    apply idpath.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
Q: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
z: C₃
x: C₁
y, y': C₂
mon_rassociator (P y x)
  (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y) (Q z y')
· mon_lassociator (P y x) (E₂ ⦃ y', y ⦄) (Q z y') =
identity
  (P y x
   ⊗ (identity_enriched_profunctor E₂ y' y ⊗ Q z y'))

  apply mon_rassociator_lassociator.
Qed.

(** * 3. The pentagon law *)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
enriched_profunctor_comp_transformation
  (enriched_profunctor_comp_transformation
     (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor P₁
        (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄))
     (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄))
  (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor
     (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ P₃) P₄) =
enriched_profunctor_comp_transformation
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄))
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄)


V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
enriched_profunctor_comp_transformation
  (enriched_profunctor_comp_transformation
     (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor P₁
        (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄))
     (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄))
  (rwhisker_enriched_profunctor
     (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ P₃) P₄) =
enriched_profunctor_comp_transformation
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄))
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄) z v
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z v
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ P₃) P₄ z v =
lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P₁ P₂
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z v
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z v

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
∏ y : C₂,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄)) z v y
· (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
     (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄) z v
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z v
   · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
       (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ P₃) P₄ z
       v) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄)) z v y
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P₁ P₂
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z v
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z v)

  
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄)) z v w
· (lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
     (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄) z v
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z v
   · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
       (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ P₃) P₄ z
       v) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄)) z v w
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P₁ P₂
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z v
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z v)

  
V: benabou_cosmos

v: C₁
w: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄)) z v w
· lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁

· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P₁ P₂
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z v
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z v

  
V: benabou_cosmos

V: benabou_cosmos

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁

  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄)) z v w

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄)) z v w
· lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
    (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄) z v =
?y'

    apply lwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor_comm.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
identity (P₁ w v)
#⊗ lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄) z v w
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z v
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ P₃) P₄ z v =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄)) z v w
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P₁ P₂
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z v
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z v

  
V: benabou_cosmos

w: C₂
identity (P₁ w v)
#⊗ lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁

       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄) z v w
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P₁

identity (P₁ w v)
#⊗ lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄) z v w
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P₁
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z v
      · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
          (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ P₃)
          P₄ z v)) = ?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄) z v w
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z v
   · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
       (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ P₃) P₄ z
       v) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

  (comp_enriched_profunctor
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄) z v w
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z v

w: C₂
identity (P₁ w v)
#⊗ lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w)
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v
     #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
   · internal_eval (P₁ w v)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)) P₄ z v)

  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂

· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data P₁ P₂
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z v
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z v

z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v)
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w v
   #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
   · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w v
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (internal_eval (P₁ w v)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z v)
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z v) =
lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v
   #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
   · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)) P₄ z v)
      · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
          (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ P₃)
          P₄ z v))

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
internal_lam
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w v
   #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
   · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z v)
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z v)) =
internal_lam
  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
   #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v
      #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
      · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)) P₄
              z v)
         · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
             (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ P₃)
             P₄ z v)))

E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
∏ y : C₃,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w y
· internal_lam
    (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w v
     #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
     · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z v)
        · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z v)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w y
· internal_lam
    (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
     #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
     · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v
        #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
        · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))
                P₄ z v)
           · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
               (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂
                  P₃) P₄ z v)))

             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))
                P₄ z v)
           · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
               (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂
                  P₃) P₄ z v)))

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄

z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, P₁ w v ⟧),
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
 · internal_lam
     (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w v
      #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
      · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z v)
         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_data
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z
             v))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₁ w v)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
 · internal_lam
     (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
      #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
      · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v
         #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
         · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))
                 P₄ z v)
            · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
                (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂
                   P₃) P₄ z v)))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₁ w v)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v)

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V
  (P₂ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
  (P₁ w v)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
      · identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
        #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w)) =
?y'

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V
  (P₂ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
  (P₁ w v)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
· identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w = ?y'

    apply idpath.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
sym_mon_braiding V
  (P₂ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
  (P₁ w v)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
· identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z x v
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
· internal_eval (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
  #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v
  #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· internal_eval (P₁ w v)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)) P₄ z v)
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ P₃) P₄ z v

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
internal_lam
  (sym_mon_braiding V
     (P₂ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
     (P₁ w v)
   · mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
   · identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
     #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z x v
     #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
   · internal_eval
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z
          v)) =
internal_lam
  (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
   #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
     #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
   · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v
     #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
   · internal_eval (P₁ w v)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)) P₄ z v)
   · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
       (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ P₃) P₄ z
       v)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
internal_transpose
  (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (P₂ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
        (P₁ w v)
      · mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
      · identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
        #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z x v
        #⊗ identity
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
      · internal_eval
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃)
             P₄ z v))) =
internal_transpose
  (internal_lam
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
      #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
        #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
      · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v
        #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
      · internal_eval (P₁ w v)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)) P₄ z
             v)
      · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
          (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ P₃)
          P₄ z v))

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
∏ y : C₄,
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
· internal_transpose
    (internal_lam
       (sym_mon_braiding V
          (P₂ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
          (P₁ w v)
        · mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
        · sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
        · identity
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
          #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
        · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z x
            v
          #⊗ identity
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
        · internal_eval
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃)
               P₄ z v))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
· internal_transpose
    (internal_lam
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
        #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
        · lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
          #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
        · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v
          #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
        · internal_eval (P₁ w v)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)) P₄
               z v)
        · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
            (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ P₃)
            P₄ z v))

P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
· internal_transpose
    (internal_lam
       (sym_mon_braiding V
          (P₂ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
          (P₁ w v)
        · mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
        · sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
        · identity
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
          #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
        · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z x
            v
          #⊗ identity
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
        · internal_eval
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃)
               P₄ z v))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
· internal_transpose
    (internal_lam
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
        #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
        · lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
          #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
        · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v
          #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
        · internal_eval (P₁ w v)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)) P₄
               z v)
        · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
            (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ P₃)
            P₄ z v))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, P₂ x w ⟧),
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
 · internal_transpose
     (internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V
           (P₂ x w
            ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
           (P₁ w v)
         · mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
         · sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
         · identity
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
           #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z
             x v
           #⊗ identity
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
         · internal_eval
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃)
                P₄ z v)))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₂ x w)
    (P₁ w v
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
         (comp_enriched_profunctor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z
         v) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
 · internal_transpose
     (internal_lam
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
         #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z
             w #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v
           #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
         · internal_eval (P₁ w v)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))
                P₄ z v)
         · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
             (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ P₃)
             P₄ z v))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₂ x w)
    (P₁ w v
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
         (comp_enriched_profunctor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z
         v)

x: C₃
y: C₄
a: V

(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
 · internal_transpose

            ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
           (P₁ w v)

           #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor

             x v
           #⊗ identity
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
         · internal_eval

             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃)
                P₄ z v)))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₂ x w)
    (P₁ w v
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob

         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁

                P₄ z v)
         · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
             (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ P₃)
             P₄ z v))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₂ x w)
    (P₁ w v
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₂ x w ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y #⊗ h
· internal_transpose
    (internal_lam
       (sym_mon_braiding V
          (P₂ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
          (P₁ w v)
        · mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
        · sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
        · identity
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
          #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
        · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z x
            v
          #⊗ identity
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
        · internal_eval
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃)
               P₄ z v))) #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
· internal_eval (P₂ x w)
    (P₁ w v
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
         (comp_enriched_profunctor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z
         v) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y #⊗ h
· internal_transpose
    (internal_lam
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
        #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
        · lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
          #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
        · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v
          #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
        · internal_eval (P₁ w v)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)) P₄
               z v)
        · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
            (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ P₃)
            P₄ z v)) #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
· internal_eval (P₂ x w)
    (P₁ w v
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
         (comp_enriched_profunctor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z
         v)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₂ x w ⟧
identity (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y) #⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
  #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
· internal_transpose
    (internal_lam
       (sym_mon_braiding V
          (P₂ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
          (P₁ w v)
        · mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
        · sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
        · identity
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
          #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
        · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z x
            v
          #⊗ identity
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
        · internal_eval
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃)
               P₄ z v))) #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
· internal_eval (P₂ x w)
    (P₁ w v
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
         (comp_enriched_profunctor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z
         v) =
identity (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y) #⊗ h
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
  #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
· internal_transpose
    (internal_lam
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
        #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
        · lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
          #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
        · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v
          #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
        · internal_eval (P₁ w v)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)) P₄
               z v)
        · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
            (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ P₃)
            P₄ z v)) #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
· internal_eval (P₂ x w)
    (P₁ w v
     ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
         (comp_enriched_profunctor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z
         v)

z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₂ x w ⟧
identity (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y) #⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
   #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
   · (internal_transpose
        (internal_lam
           (sym_mon_braiding V
              (P₂ x w
               ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
              (P₁ w v)
            · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
               · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z
                       x)
                  · (identity
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄
                          z x)
                     #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
                          P₂ x v w
                     · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                             P₂) P₃ P₄ z x v
                        #⊗ identity
                             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                                P₁ P₂ x v)
                        · internal_eval
                            (comp_enriched_profunctor
                               P₁ P₂ x v)
                            (comp_enriched_profunctor
                               (comp_enriched_profunctor
                                  (comp_enriched_profunctor
                                     P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v)))))))
      #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
      · internal_eval (P₂ x w)
          (P₁ w v
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
               (comp_enriched_profunctor
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃)
               P₄ z v))) =
identity (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y) #⊗ h
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
   #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
   · (internal_transpose
        (internal_lam
           (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
            #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
            · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃
                 P₄ z w #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
               · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                    P₁
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)
                    P₄ z w v #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
                  · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor
                          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                                P₂ P₃)) P₄ z v)
                     · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
                         (lassociator_enriched_profunctor
                            P₁ P₂ P₃) P₄ z v)))))
      #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
      · internal_eval (P₂ x w)
          (P₁ w v
           ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
               (comp_enriched_profunctor
                  (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃)
               P₄ z v)))

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₂ x w ⟧
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
#⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
· (internal_transpose
     (internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V
           (P₂ x w
            ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
           (P₁ w v)
         · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
               · (identity
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z
                       x)
                  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂
                       x v w
                  · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                       P₃ P₄ z x v
                     #⊗ identity
                          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                             P₂ x v)
                     · internal_eval
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                            P₂ x v)
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor
                            (comp_enriched_profunctor
                               (comp_enriched_profunctor
                                  P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v)))))))
   #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
   · internal_eval (P₂ x w)
       (P₁ w v
        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄
            z v)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
#⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
· (internal_transpose
     (internal_lam
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
         #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
         · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z
              w #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
            · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z
                 w v #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
               · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂
                             P₃)) P₄ z v)
                  · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
                      (lassociator_enriched_profunctor
                         P₁ P₂ P₃) P₄ z v)))))
   #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
   · internal_eval (P₂ x w)
       (P₁ w v
        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄
            z v))

z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
#⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
· (internal_transpose
     (internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V
           (P₂ x w
            ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
           (P₁ w v)
         · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)

            · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)

               · (identity
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z
                       x)
                  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂
                       x v w
                  · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                       P₃ P₄ z x v
                     #⊗ identity
                          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                             P₂ x v)
                     · internal_eval
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                            P₂ x v)

                            (comp_enriched_profunctor
                               (comp_enriched_profunctor

#⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
· (internal_transpose
     (internal_lam

           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
         #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
         · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z
              w #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
            · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z
                 w v #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
               · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂
                             P₃)) P₄ z v)
                  · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
                      (lassociator_enriched_profunctor
                         P₁ P₂ P₃) P₄ z v)))))
   #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
   · internal_eval (P₂ x w)

        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄
            z v))

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
#⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x) (P₂ x w)
      · internal_lam
          (sym_mon_braiding V
             (P₂ x w
              ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
             (P₁ w v)
           · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
              · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
                 · (identity
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄
                         z x)
                    #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
                         P₂ x v w
                    · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                            P₂) P₃ P₄ z x v
                       #⊗ identity
                            (comp_enriched_profunctor
                               P₁ P₂ x v)
                       · internal_eval
                           (comp_enriched_profunctor
                              P₁ P₂ x v)
                           (comp_enriched_profunctor
                              (comp_enriched_profunctor
                                 (comp_enriched_profunctor
                                    P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v)))))))
   #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
   · internal_eval (P₂ x w)
       (P₁ w v
        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob

               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄
            z v)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
#⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x) (P₂ x w)
      · internal_lam
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
           #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
           · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄
                z w #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
              · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                   P₁ (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)
                   P₄ z w v #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
                 · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                            (comp_enriched_profunctor
                               P₂ P₃)) P₄ z v)
                    · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
                        (lassociator_enriched_profunctor
                           P₁ P₂ P₃) P₄ z v)))))
   #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
   · internal_eval (P₂ x w)
       (P₁ w v
        ⊸ comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄
            z v))

v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
#⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x) (P₂ x w)
   · internal_lam
       (sym_mon_braiding V
          (P₂ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
          (P₁ w v)
        · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
           · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
              · (identity
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
                 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂
                      x v w
                 · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                      P₃ P₄ z x v
                    #⊗ identity
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                            P₂ x v)
                    · internal_eval
                        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                           P₂ x v)
                        (comp_enriched_profunctor
                           (comp_enriched_profunctor
                              (comp_enriched_profunctor
                                 P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v))))))) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
#⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x) (P₂ x w)
   · internal_lam
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
        #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
        · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z
             w #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
           · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z
                w v #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
              · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂
                            P₃)) P₄ z v)
                 · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
                     (lassociator_enriched_profunctor
                        P₁ P₂ P₃) P₄ z v)))))

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
#⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x) (P₂ x w)
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V
       (P₂ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
       (P₁ w v)
     · mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
     · sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
     · identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
       #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z x v
       #⊗ identity
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
     · internal_eval
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄
            z v)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
#⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x) (P₂ x w)
· internal_lam
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
     #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
       #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v
       #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
     · internal_eval (P₁ w v)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)) P₄ z
            v)
     · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
         (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ P₃) P₄
         z v)

x: C₃
y: C₄
sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y) (P₂ x w)
· identity (P₂ x w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V
       (P₂ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
       (P₁ w v)
     · mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
     · sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
     · identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
       #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z x v
       #⊗ identity
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
     · internal_eval
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄
            z v)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y) (P₂ x w)
· identity (P₂ x w)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
· internal_lam
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
     #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
       #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
     · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v
       #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
     · internal_eval (P₁ w v)
         (comp_enriched_profunctor
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)) P₄ z
            v)
     · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
         (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ P₃) P₄
         z v)

z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y) (P₂ x w)
· (identity (P₂ x w)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
   · internal_lam
       (sym_mon_braiding V
          (P₂ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
          (P₁ w v)
        · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
           · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
              · (identity
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
                 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂
                      x v w
                 · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                      P₃ P₄ z x v
                    #⊗ identity
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                            P₂ x v)
                    · internal_eval
                        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                           P₂ x v)
                        (comp_enriched_profunctor
                           (comp_enriched_profunctor
                              (comp_enriched_profunctor
                                 P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v))))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y) (P₂ x w)
· (identity (P₂ x w)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
   · internal_lam
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
        #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
        · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z
             w #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
           · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z
                w v #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
              · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂
                            P₃)) P₄ z v)
                 · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
                     (lassociator_enriched_profunctor
                        P₁ P₂ P₃) P₄ z v)))))

z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
identity (P₂ x w)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V
       (P₂ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
       (P₁ w v)
     · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
        · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
           · (identity
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
              #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v
                   w
              · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                   P₄ z x v
                 #⊗ identity
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂
                         x v)
                 · internal_eval
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x
                        v)
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor
                        (comp_enriched_profunctor
                           (comp_enriched_profunctor
                              P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v)))))) =
identity (P₂ x w)
#⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
· internal_lam
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
     #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
     · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
        #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
        · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v
           #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
           · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))
                   P₄ z v)
              · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
                  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁
                     P₂ P₃) P₄ z v))))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, P₁ w v ⟧),
(identity (P₂ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
 · internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (P₂ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
        (P₁ w v)
      · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
            · (identity
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
               #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x
                    v w
               · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                    P₃ P₄ z x v
                  #⊗ identity
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂
                          x v)
                  · internal_eval
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂
                         x v)
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor
                            (comp_enriched_profunctor
                               P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v)))))))
#⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₁ w v)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v) =
(identity (P₂ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
 · internal_lam
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
      #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
      · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
         #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
         · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w
              v #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
            · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))
                    P₄ z v)
               · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
                   (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁
                      P₂ P₃) P₄ z v))))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₁ w v)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v)

         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)

 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y

      #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)

                 (comp_enriched_profunctor

                       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))

                      P₂ P₃) P₄ z v))))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P₁ w v)

y: C₄
a: V

 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y) #⊗ h

    (sym_mon_braiding V

                        (comp_enriched_profunctor
                           (comp_enriched_profunctor

     #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)

z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ w v ⟧
identity (P₂ x w ⊗ (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)) #⊗ h
· (identity (P₂ x w)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y)
  #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· internal_lam
    (sym_mon_braiding V
       (P₂ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
       (P₁ w v)
     · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)

        · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)

           · (identity
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)

                   w
              · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                   P₄ z x v
                 #⊗ identity
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂
                         x v)
                 · internal_eval
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x
                        v)
                     (comp_enriched_profunctor
                        (comp_enriched_profunctor
                           (comp_enriched_profunctor
                              P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v))))))
  #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· internal_eval (P₁ w v)

       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v) =

· (identity (P₂ x w)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y)
  #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· internal_lam
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
     #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
     · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
        #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
        · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v
           #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
           · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)

                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))
                   P₄ z v)
              · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
                  (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁
                     P₂ P₃) P₄ z v))))
  #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· internal_eval (P₁ w v)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v)

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ w v ⟧
identity (P₂ x w ⊗ (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)) #⊗ h
· ((identity (P₂ x w)
    #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y)
   #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
   · (internal_lam
        (sym_mon_braiding V
           (P₂ x w
            ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
           (P₁ w v)
         · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
            · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
               · (identity
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z
                       x)
                  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂
                       x v w
                  · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                       P₃ P₄ z x v
                     #⊗ identity
                          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                             P₂ x v)
                     · internal_eval
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                            P₂ x v)
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor
                            (comp_enriched_profunctor
                               (comp_enriched_profunctor
                                  P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v))))))
      #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
      · internal_eval (P₁ w v)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃)
             P₄ z v))) =
identity (P₂ x w ⊗ (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)) #⊗ h
· ((identity (P₂ x w)
    #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y)
   #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
   · (internal_lam
        (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
         #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
         · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z
              w #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
            · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z
                 w v #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
               · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂
                             P₃)) P₄ z v)
                  · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
                      (lassociator_enriched_profunctor
                         P₁ P₂ P₃) P₄ z v))))
      #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
      · internal_eval (P₁ w v)
          (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃)
             P₄ z v)))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
a: V
h: V ⟦ a, P₁ w v ⟧
(identity (P₂ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (P₂ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
        (P₁ w v)
      · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
            · (identity
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
               #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x
                    v w
               · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                    P₃ P₄ z x v
                  #⊗ identity
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂
                          x v)
                  · internal_eval
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂
                         x v)
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor
                            (comp_enriched_profunctor
                               P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v))))))
   #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
   · internal_eval (P₁ w v)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z
          v)) =
(identity (P₂ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (internal_lam
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
      #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
      · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
         #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
         · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w
              v #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
            · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))
                    P₄ z v)
               · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
                   (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁
                      P₂ P₃) P₄ z v))))
   #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
   · internal_eval (P₁ w v)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z
          v))

z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
(identity (P₂ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (P₂ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
        (P₁ w v)
      · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
            · (identity
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
               #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x
                    v w
               · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                    P₃ P₄ z x v
                  #⊗ identity
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂
                          x v)
                  · internal_eval
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂
                         x v)
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor
                            (comp_enriched_profunctor
                               P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v))))))
   #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
   · internal_eval (P₁ w v)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z
          v)) =
(identity (P₂ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (internal_lam
     (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
      #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
      · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
         #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
         · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w
              v #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
            · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))
                    P₄ z v)
               · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
                   (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁
                      P₂ P₃) P₄ z v))))
   #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
   · internal_eval (P₁ w v)
       (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z
          v))
