C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
(identity (P₂ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (P₂ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
     (P₁ w v)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
         · (identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
            · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                 P₄ z x v
               #⊗ identity
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x
                       v)
               · internal_eval
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                            P₂) P₃) P₄ z v)))))) =
(identity (P₂ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
   #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
      #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
      · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v
         #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
         · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))
                 P₄ z v)
            · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
                (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂
                   P₃) P₄ z v))))

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
(identity (P₂ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (P₂ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
     (P₁ w v)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
         · (identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
            · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                 P₄ z x v
               #⊗ identity
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x
                       v)
               · internal_eval
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                            P₂) P₃) P₄ z v)))))) = 
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
?b =
(identity (P₂ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
   #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
      #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
      · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v
         #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
         · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))
                 P₄ z v)
            · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
                (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂
                   P₃) P₄ z v))))

w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
(identity (P₂ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (sym_mon_braiding V
     (P₂ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
     (P₁ w v)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)

            · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                 P₄ z x v
               #⊗ identity
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x
                       v)
               · internal_eval
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                            P₂) P₃) P₄ z v)))))) = 
?b

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
(identity (P₂ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· sym_mon_braiding V
    (P₂ x w ⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
    (P₁ w v)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
· identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z x v
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
· internal_eval (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v) =
?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y))
  (P₁ w v)
· identity (P₁ w v)
  #⊗ (identity (P₂ x w)
      #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
· identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z x v
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
· internal_eval (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v) =
?b

v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y))
  (P₁ w v)
· (identity (P₁ w v)
   #⊗ (identity (P₂ x w)
       #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
         · (identity
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
            #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
            · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃
                 P₄ z x v
               #⊗ identity
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x
                       v)
               · internal_eval
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor
                         (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                            P₂) P₃) P₄ z v)))))) = 
?b

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
identity (P₁ w v)
#⊗ (identity (P₂ x w)
    #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
      · (identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
         · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z
              x v
            #⊗ identity
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
            · internal_eval
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                      P₃) P₄ z v))))) = ?t2

#⊗ (identity (P₂ x w)
    #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)

  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)

    (comp_enriched_profunctor

?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
· (identity (P₁ w v) #⊗ identity (P₂ x w))
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
· identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z x v
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
· internal_eval (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v) =
?t2

z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
· ((identity (P₁ w v) #⊗ identity (P₂ x w))
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
      · (identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄ z x)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
         · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z
              x v
            #⊗ identity
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
            · internal_eval
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
                (comp_enriched_profunctor
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                      P₃) P₄ z v))))) = ?t2

w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄

P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z x v
  #⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
· internal_eval (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
 · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z x v)
#⊗ identity (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
· internal_eval (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v) =
?t2

    apply lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_comm.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y))
  (P₁ w v)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
        (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
      · (identity (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z
             y x v))) =
(identity (P₂ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
   #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
      #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
      · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v
         #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
         · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))
                 P₄ z v)
            · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
                (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂
                   P₃) P₄ z v))))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y))
  (P₁ w v)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
        (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
      · (identity (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z
             y x v))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
?b =
(identity (P₂ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
   #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
      #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
      · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v
         #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
         · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))
                 P₄ z v)
            · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
                (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂
                   P₃) P₄ z v))))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y))
  (P₁ w v)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
        (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
      · (identity (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ P₄ z
             y x v))) = ?b

w: C₂
x: C₃

sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y))
  (P₁ w v)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w)
        (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
      · (identity (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
         #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
            · mon_rassociator
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
                (P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ y
                v x #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                (comp_enriched_profunctor
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃)
                P₄ z v y)))) = ?b

· (identity (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
   #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)

             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z
          v y)) = ?t2

v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w) (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
· identity (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
  #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)

  #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in

       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v y =

v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃

  (P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ y v x
  #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y))
  (P₁ w v)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
      #⊗ identity (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
      · (mon_rassociator
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
           (P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ y v x
           #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃)
             P₄ z v y))) =
(identity (P₂ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
   #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
      #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
      · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v
         #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
         · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))
                 P₄ z v)
            · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
                (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂
                   P₃) P₄ z v))))

v: C₁

x: C₃

sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y))
  (P₁ w v)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
      #⊗ identity (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
      · (mon_rassociator
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
           (P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ y v x
           #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
         · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃)
             P₄ z v y))) = ?b

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
?b =
(identity (P₂ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
   #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
      #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
      · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v
         #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
         · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))
                 P₄ z v)
            · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
                (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂
                   P₃) P₄ z v))))

P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
#⊗ (identity (P₃ y x) #⊗ identity (P₄ z y))
· mon_rassociator (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ x v)
    (P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ y v x
  #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v y =
?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
mon_rassociator (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w) (P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
   #⊗ identity (P₃ y x)) #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ y v x
  #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v y =
?t2

    apply idpath.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y))
  (P₁ w v)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w) (P₃ y x)
        (P₄ z y)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
         #⊗ identity (P₃ y x)) #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ y v x
        #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z
          v y)) =
(identity (P₂ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
   #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
      #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
      · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v
         #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
         · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))
                 P₄ z v)
            · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
                (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂
                   P₃) P₄ z v))))

z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
(identity (P₂ x w)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₃ P₄) z w x
   #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
   · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃ P₄ z w
      #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
      · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v
         #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
         · (internal_eval (P₁ w v)
              (comp_enriched_profunctor
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))
                 P₄ z v)
            · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
                (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂
                   P₃) P₄ z v)))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y))
  (P₁ w v)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w) (P₃ y x)
        (P₄ z y)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
         #⊗ identity (P₃ y x)) #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ y v x
        #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z
          v y))

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category

z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y))
  (P₁ w v)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w) (P₃ y x)
        (P₄ z y)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
         #⊗ identity (P₃ y x)) #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ y v x
        #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z
          v y))

E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
(sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
   #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
 · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₂ P₃ P₄ z x w
   #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
 · internal_eval (P₂ x w)
     (comp_enriched_profunctor
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w)
 · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· internal_eval (P₁ w v)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)) P₄ z v) =
?y'

 · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
    #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
    · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₂ P₃ P₄ z
         x w #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
       · (internal_eval (P₂ x w)
            (comp_enriched_profunctor
               (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w)
          · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w
              v)))) #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· internal_eval (P₁ w v)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)) P₄ z v) =
?y'

   #⊗ identity (P₂ x w)

v: C₁

y: C₄

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₃ P₄ z x y
 · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₂ P₃ P₄ z x w)
#⊗ identity (P₂ x w)
· internal_eval (P₂ x w)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w) = 
?y'

      apply lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_comm.

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
(lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob P₂ P₃ P₄ z y x
   w
 · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· internal_eval (P₁ w v)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)) P₄ z v) =

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
(sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y) (P₂ x w)
 · mon_rassociator (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ y w x
   #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w y
 · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· internal_eval (P₁ w v)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)) P₄ z v) =
?t2

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
(sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y) (P₂ x w)
 · (mon_rassociator (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)
    · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ y w x
       #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
       · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w y
          · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w
              v)))) #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· internal_eval (P₁ w v)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)) P₄ z v) =
?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y) (P₂ x w)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (mon_rassociator (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)
   #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
   · ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ y w x
       #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)) #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w y
         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v)
        #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)))
· internal_eval (P₁ w v)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)) P₄ z v) =
?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y) (P₂ x w)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (mon_rassociator (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)
   #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
   · ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ y w x
       #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)) #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
      · ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in
            (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w y
          · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w
              v) #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
         · internal_eval (P₁ w v)
             (comp_enriched_profunctor
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃))
                P₄ z v)))) = ?t2

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in
   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w y
 · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z w v)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· internal_eval (P₁ w v)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)) P₄ z v) =
?t2

    apply (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_comm
             P₁ (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄).
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y) (P₂ x w)
   #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)
      #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
      · ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ y w x
          #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)) #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob P₁
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z y w
             v)))
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ P₃) P₄ z v =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y))
  (P₁ w v)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w) (P₃ y x)
        (P₄ z y)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
         #⊗ identity (P₃ y x)) #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ y v x
        #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z
          v y))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y) (P₂ x w)
   #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)
      #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
      · ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ y w x
          #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)) #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
         · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob P₁
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) P₄ z y w
             v)))
· rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
    (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ P₃) P₄ z v =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y))
  (P₁ w v)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w) (P₃ y x)
        (P₄ z y)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
         #⊗ identity (P₃ y x)) #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ y v x
        #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z
          v y))

?t2

w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)
· ((identity (P₁ w v)
    #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ y w x)
   #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
   · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
        (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) y v w
      #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃)) P₄ z v
           y
         · rwhisker_enriched_profunctor_mor
             (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂ P₃)
             P₄ z v))) = ?t2

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
mon_rassociator (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
     (P₁ w v)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x)
        (P₄ z y)
      · ((identity (P₁ w v)
          #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ y w x)
         #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
         · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁
              (comp_enriched_profunctor P₂ P₃) y v w
            #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
            · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂
                 P₃ y v #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
               · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor
                      (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂)
                      P₃) P₄ z v y))))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y))
  (P₁ w v)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w) (P₃ y x)
        (P₄ z y)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
         #⊗ identity (P₃ y x)) #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ y v x
        #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z
          v y))

   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w) (P₃ y x)

   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x)

          #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ y w x)
         #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
         · ((sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v)

             · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁

             · internal_eval (P₁ w v)

                    P₃ y v)) #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)

   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w) (P₃ y x)

         #⊗ identity (P₃ y x)) #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ y v x

(identity (P₁ w v)
 #⊗ comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ y w x
 · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v)
      (comp_enriched_profunctor_ob P₂ P₃ y w)
    · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ y w
        v #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
    · internal_eval (P₁ w v)
        (comp_enriched_profunctor
           (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ y v)))
#⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v y =
?t2

#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ y w v

v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄

#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ y w v
  #⊗ identity (P₁ w v)

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₂ P₃ y w x
 · lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor P₁ P₂ P₃ y w v)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· internal_eval (P₁ w v)
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ y v) = 
?y'

    apply lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_comm.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
mon_rassociator (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
     (P₁ w v)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x)
        (P₄ z y)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x)
         #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
         · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob P₁
              P₂ P₃ y x w v #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                (comp_enriched_profunctor
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃)
                P₄ z v y)))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y))
  (P₁ w v)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w) (P₃ y x)
        (P₄ z y)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
         #⊗ identity (P₃ y x)) #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ y v x
        #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z
          v y))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
mon_rassociator (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
     (P₁ w v)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x)
        (P₄ z y)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x)
         #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
         · (lassociator_enriched_profunctor_mor_ob P₁
              P₂ P₃ y x w v #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                (comp_enriched_profunctor
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃)
                P₄ z v y)))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y))
  (P₁ w v)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w) (P₃ y x)
        (P₄ z y)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
         #⊗ identity (P₃ y x)) #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ y v x
        #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z
          v y))

#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
     (P₁ w v)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x)

#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
     (P₁ w v)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x)
        (P₄ z y)

               (P₁ w v)
             · mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w)
                 (P₃ y x)
             · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
               #⊗ identity (P₃ y x)
             · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                 (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ y
                 v x) #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in

                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃)

       y) = ?t2

x: C₃
y: C₄
(sym_mon_braiding V (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x)
 · sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x) (P₁ w v)
 · mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
   #⊗ identity (P₃ y x)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ y v x)
#⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v y =
?t2

z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃

(identity (P₁ w v ⊗ (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x))
 · mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
   #⊗ identity (P₃ y x)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
     (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ y v x)

· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v y =
?t2

v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃

 #⊗ identity (P₃ y x)
 · comp_enriched_profunctor_in

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
 #⊗ identity (P₃ y x)) #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ y v x
  #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v y =

    apply idpath.
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
mon_rassociator (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
     (P₁ w v)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x)
        (P₄ z y)
      · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x)
         #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
         · ((comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
             #⊗ identity (P₃ y x))
            #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ y
                v x #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
            · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
                (comp_enriched_profunctor
                   (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃)
                P₄ z v y)))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y))
  (P₁ w v)
· (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w) (P₃ y x)
        (P₄ z y)
      · (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
         #⊗ identity (P₃ y x)) #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ y v x
        #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
      · comp_enriched_profunctor_in
          (comp_enriched_profunctor
             (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z
          v y))

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V

E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
mon_rassociator (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
    (P₁ w v)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x)
  #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
   #⊗ identity (P₃ y x)) #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ y v x
  #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v y =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y))
  (P₁ w v)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w) (P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)
· (comp_enriched_profunctor_in P₁ P₂ x v w
   #⊗ identity (P₃ y x)) #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃ y v x
  #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)
· comp_enriched_profunctor_in
    (comp_enriched_profunctor
       (comp_enriched_profunctor P₁ P₂) P₃) P₄ z v y

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
E₃: enrichment C₃ V
E₄: enrichment C₄ V
E₅: enrichment C₅ V
P₁: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃
P₃: enriched_profunctor E₃ E₄
P₄: enriched_profunctor E₄ E₅
z: C₅
v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
mon_rassociator (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
    (P₁ w v)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x)
  #⊗ identity (P₄ z y) =
sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y))
  (P₁ w v)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ w v ⊗ P₂ x w) (P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)

#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)

P₂: enriched_profunctor E₂ E₃

v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
mon_rassociator (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
     (P₁ w v)
   · (mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x)

       (P₄ z y)

v: C₁
w: C₂
x: C₃
y: C₄
mon_rassociator (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)
#⊗ identity (P₁ w v)
· sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y)
    (P₁ w v)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)

· identity (P₁ w v)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x)
  #⊗ identity (P₄ z y)

sym_mon_braiding V (P₂ x w ⊗ (P₃ y x ⊗ P₄ z y))
  (P₁ w v)
· identity (P₁ w v)
  #⊗ mon_rassociator (P₂ x w) (P₃ y x) (P₄ z y)
· mon_rassociator (P₁ w v) (P₂ x w ⊗ P₃ y x) (P₄ z y) =
